gapAnalysis.finding: Some REST routes lack proper permission callbacks
gapAnalysis.recommendation: Add permission_callback with current_user_can() checks to all REST routes

gapAnalysis.finding: Custom tables exist but no uninstall hook to clean them up
gapAnalysis.recommendation: Add uninstall.php or register_uninstall_hook to drop custom tables on plugin deletion

gapAnalysis.finding: Custom tables exist but no activation hook to create them
gapAnalysis.recommendation: Add register_activation_hook to create tables via dbDelta() on plugin activation

gapAnalysis.finding: Cron jobs scheduled but no deactivation hook to clear them
gapAnalysis.recommendation: Add register_deactivation_hook to wp_clear_scheduled_hook() all plugin cron events

gapAnalysis.finding: Admin pages exist but no settings registered via Settings API
gapAnalysis.recommendation: Use register_setting() and add_settings_field() for proper WP settings management

gapAnalysis.finding: Templates lack action/filter hooks for theme customization
gapAnalysis.recommendation: Add do_action() and apply_filters() hooks in templates for extensibility

gapAnalysis.finding: Cross-layer wiring issues detected between JS and PHP
gapAnalysis.recommendation: Fix broken AJAX calls, dead handlers, nonce mismatches, and orphaned selectors
Add block patterns to give users pre-built layouts using your blocks
Add register_activation_hook() for initial setup (version check, default options, flush rewrite rules)
Add register_deactivation_hook() for cleanup (clear cron, flush rewrite rules)

gapAnalysis.finding: No "Requires at least" WP version specified
gapAnalysis.recommendation: Add "Requires at least: 6.0" (or your minimum) to the plugin header
Add "Requires PHP: 7.4" (or your minimum) to the plugin header

critical: [GAP] Some REST routes lack proper permission callbacks — Add permission_callback with current_user_can() checks to all REST routes
[GAP] Custom tables exist but no uninstall hook to clean them up — Add uninstall.php or register_uninstall_hook to drop custom tables on plugin deletion
[GAP] Custom tables exist but no activation hook to create them — Add register_activation_hook to create tables via dbDelta() on plugin activation
[GAP] Cron jobs scheduled but no deactivation hook to clear them — Add register_deactivation_hook to wp_clear_scheduled_hook() all plugin cron events
[marketing] Version mismatch: readme "1.4.0" vs header "1.0.0" — Ensure "Stable tag" in readme.txt matches "Version" in the main plugin file header
important: [GAP] Admin pages exist but no settings registered via Settings API — Use register_setting() and add_settings_field() for proper WP settings management
[GAP] Templates lack action/filter hooks for theme customization — Add do_action() and apply_filters() hooks in templates for extensibility
[GAP] Cross-layer wiring issues detected between JS and PHP — Fix broken AJAX calls, dead handlers, nonce mismatches, and orphaned selectors

critical.title: Version mismatch: readme "1.4.0" vs header "1.0.0"
critical.actual: Readme "Stable tag: 1.4.0" does not match plugin header "Version: 1.0.0". This causes WordPress.org to serve the wrong version.
critical.fix: Ensure "Stable tag" in readme.txt matches "Version" in the main plugin file header

real_findings.title: 2 form inputs without labels
real_findings.actual: Found 2 <input>/<select>/<textarea> elements without an associated <label for>, aria-label, or aria-labelledby. Samples: src/Admin/PointTypeConversionsPage.php:247, src/Admin/PointTypeConversionsPage.php:259
real_findings.fix: Add <label for="id"> with matching input id, aria-label="…", or aria-labelledby="…"

real_findings.title: 3 images without alt attribute
real_findings.actual: Found tags without an alt attribute. Use alt="" for decorative images and descriptive text otherwise.
real_findings.fix: Add alt attribute to all tags. Use alt="" for decorative images.

real_findings.title: outline:none without :focus-visible replacement
real_findings.actual: Selector ".wb-gam-submission-thumb:focus-visible" removes the focus outline but no later rule adds a replacement.
real_findings.fix: Add a matching :focus-visible rule with outline: 2px solid <brand>; outline-offset: 2px;

real_findings.title: outline:none without :focus-visible replacement
real_findings.actual: Selector "display:inline-block;width:56px;height:56px;border:1px solid var(--wbgam-border,#e5e7eb);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;background:var(--wbgam-bg-muted,#f9fafb);transition:transform 120ms ease,border-color 120ms ease}.wb-gam-submission-thumb:focus-visible,.wb-gam-submission-thumb:hover" removes the focus outline but no later rule adds a replacement.
real_findings.fix: Add a matching :focus-visible rule with outline: 2px solid <brand>; outline-offset: 2px;

real_findings.title: Direct $_POST to update_option (bypasses Settings API)
real_findings.actual: Saving settings directly from $_POST bypasses WordPress sanitization and nonce verification built into the Settings API.
real_findings.fix: Use register_setting() with sanitize_callback and settings_fields() for proper form handling

real_findings.title: POST form without nonce verification
real_findings.actual: A form using method="POST" was found without wp_nonce_field() or settings_fields(). This is a CSRF vulnerability.
real_findings.fix: Add wp_nonce_field() inside the form and verify with wp_verify_nonce() or check_admin_referer() on submission

real_findings.title: Modal/popup missing close button
real_findings.actual: Modal or popup detected without a close/dismiss element. Users may get trapped.
real_findings.fix: Add a visible close button (.close, .dismiss, or × character) to the modal

real_findings.title: Enum drift on "status"
real_findings.actual: Multiple files disagree on allowed values for "status". src/API/ChallengesController.php:195 allows [active, inactive] | src/API/CommunityChallengesController.php:86 allows [active, all, inactive]
real_findings.fix: Extract the canonical list to one place (a class constant or Enums helper) and have admin/REST/service all call it. Run SELECT DISTINCT status FROM <table> to find rows written with now-dead values.

real_findings.title: Enum drift on "type"
real_findings.actual: Multiple files disagree on allowed values for "type". src/API/MembersController.php:696 allows [badge, challenge, kudos, level_up, points, streak_milestone] | src/BuddyPress/Stream/ActivityCard.php:170 allows [badge, challenge, kudos, level] | src/Engine/RankAutomation.php:171 allows [add_bp_group, change_wp_role, send_bp_message] | src/Engine/RuleEngine.php:130 allows [action_id_match, day_of_week, metadata_gte]
real_findings.fix: Extract the canonical list to one place (a class constant or Enums helper) and have admin/REST/service all call it. Run SELECT DISTINCT type FROM <table> to find rows written with now-dead values.

real_findings.title: Enum drift on "event"
real_findings.actual: Multiple files disagree on allowed values for "event". src/Admin/WebhooksAdminPage.php:345 allows [badge_earned, challenge_completed, kudos_given, level_changed, points_awarded, streak_milestone] | src/CLI/EmailCommand.php:58 allows [badge_earned, challenge_completed, leaderboard_nudge, level_up, redemption, weekly_recap]
real_findings.fix: Extract the canonical list to one place (a class constant or Enums helper) and have admin/REST/service all call it. Run SELECT DISTINCT event FROM <table> to find rows written with now-dead values.

real_findings.title: Enum drift on "reason"
real_findings.actual: Multiple files disagree on allowed values for "reason". src/Engine/NotificationBridge.php:115 allows [cooldown, daily_cap, weekly_cap] | src/Engine/RedemptionEngine.php:90 allows [insufficient, ledger_write_failed, out_of_stock, record_write_failed]
real_findings.fix: Extract the canonical list to one place (a class constant or Enums helper) and have admin/REST/service all call it. Run SELECT DISTINCT reason FROM <table> to find rows written with now-dead values.

real_findings.title: Click handler without keyboard alternative
real_findings.actual: A click handler was registered without a key handler in this file, and the handler body does not obviously target a <button>/<a>/<input>. Non-button targets need Enter/Space support.
real_findings.fix: Add a keydown handler for Enter/Space, or delegate via closest('button').

real_findings.title: Non-dismissible admin notice
real_findings.actual: An admin notice is registered without the "is-dismissible" class. Persistent notices clutter the admin and annoy users.
real_findings.fix: Add the "is-dismissible" class to the notice div and handle the dismiss action via AJAX if needed

real_findings.title: Excessive !important usage (6)
real_findings.actual: 6 uses of !important suggests specificity issues. This makes the plugin hard to customize.
real_findings.fix: Use more specific selectors instead of !important. Plugins should be easy for themes to override.

real_findings.fix: Add .catch() to handle network errors gracefully

real_findings.fix: Add .catch() to handle network errors gracefully

real_findings.title: Modal/popup missing ESC key handler
real_findings.actual: No keyboard escape handler found for modal. Users expect ESC to close popups.
real_findings.fix: Add a keydown listener for key code 27 (Escape) to close the modal

real_findings.title: Modal/popup missing ESC key handler
real_findings.actual: No keyboard escape handler found for modal. Users expect ESC to close popups.
real_findings.fix: Add a keydown listener for key code 27 (Escape) to close the modal

real_findings.title: Modal missing ARIA attributes
real_findings.actual: Modal/popup has no role="dialog" or aria-label. Screen readers won't announce it properly.
real_findings.fix: Add role="dialog" and aria-label (or aria-labelledby) to the modal container element

real_findings.title: Loop output may lack empty state
real_findings.actual: HTML-outputting loop has no empty/count check before it. Users may see blank content when there are no items.
real_findings.fix: Add an if/else check before the loop to display a meaningful empty state message

real_findings.title: Silent empty state — returns nothing to user
real_findings.actual: When data is empty, the template returns blank output. Users see nothing with no explanation.
real_findings.fix: Return a helpful message instead of empty string, e.g., "No items found. Create your first one."

real_findings.title: Description leads with solution, not problem
real_findings.actual: The description opens with what the plugin does, not the pain point it solves. Users connect with problems before solutions.
real_findings.fix: Start the description with the problem/frustration your target audience faces, then introduce the plugin as the solution

real_findings.title: No deactivation feedback capture
real_findings.actual: Plugin has a deactivation hook but does not capture user feedback or reason. Deactivation feedback is critical for reducing churn.
real_findings.fix: Add a deactivation feedback modal that asks why the user is deactivating (e.g., found alternative, too complex, temporary)
